## Checklist

- [ ] All `actions/checkout` steps pinned to `@v6`
- [ ] All `actions/setup-go` steps pinned to `@v5.5.0`
- [ ] Third-party actions pinned to a specific SHA
- [ ] `permissions:` is minimal - no `write-all`
- [ ] No hardcoded org names, repo names, or internal URLs
- [ ] No secrets echoed or logged
